extraction.one_line_summary: FUGLSANG Jakob counterattacked BENNETT George near the top of Madonna del Ghisallo with 1km to summit, gapped him on descent to solo 31-second victory.
tactical_patterns: BENNETT George attacked twice Madonna del Ghisallo final kilometer but checking computer after FUGLSANG counterattack signaled defeat before summit.
Astana deployed VLASOV Alexander domestique role despite podium form to isolate sole Jumbo-Visma BENNETT before final climb attack.
FUGLSANG waited for BENNETT's repeated accelerations to fatigue him before single decisive counter 1km from Ghisallo summit created winning gap.

rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: Acknowledged faster sprint than BENNETT prerace, chose to counter rather than mark, suggesting high confidence in selective climbing power.
rider_signals.BENNETT George: negative: Looking down at computer mid-attack before summit revealed psychological collapse; strong enough to attack twice but lacked finishing punch.
rider_signals.VLASOV Alexander: positive: Strong enough for 3rd at 51 seconds yet sacrificed result protecting FUGLSANG from chase, signals team player despite individual capability.
